overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person night driving through heavy rain and fog. The vehicle travels from urban highways through underpasses into desert roads with neon-lit billboards, stopping at a gas station before continuing onto dirt terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy multi-lane urban highway with overhead structures

agents.ego_description: cruising along the wet highway at moderate speed, navigating through foggy conditions

entered.detail: large overhead highway signs and lighting gantries spanning the road
tall streetlights illuminating the foggy atmosphere with yellow light
low concrete divider separating highway lanes
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting streetlights and vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: Driving along a foggy multi-lane highway at night with wet asphalt reflecting streetlights. Concrete barriers line the center while overhead structures mark the road ahead in the misty distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass with support pillars and reduced lighting

events.description: enters concrete underpass with heavy support pillars and dimmer lighting
exits underpass back into open foggy highway

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the covered underpass section

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
dark concrete ceiling of the underpass creating enclosed feeling
tall concrete barriers lining the sides of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete underpass with heavy support pillars and dimmer lighting, creating a sheltered environment. Tall concrete barriers line the sides before the road opens back into the foggy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with illuminated advertising billboards

events.description: large twin illuminated billboards become visible ahead in the desert
passes under the illuminated billboards while approaching oncoming traffic

agents.ego_description: accelerating on the open desert highway toward illuminated structures

notable_agents.action: oncoming vehicle with bright headlights visible in the distance

entered.detail: metal highway guardrails marking the road edges
sandy desert ground with sparse vegetation visible beyond the road
large twin digital billboards displaying advertisements with cyan and pink lighting

segments.scene_description: Driving through open desert landscape with sparse vegetation visible on both sides. Large illuminated billboards appear ahead and are passed under while an oncoming vehicle approaches in the distance, headlights cutting through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert gas station intersection with neon signage

events.description: slows and turns right at the gas station intersection
executes u-turn at gas station and rejoins the highway

agents.ego_description: navigating the intersection, slowing down and turning around at the gas station before rejoining the highway

notable_agents.action: figures standing near the gas station pumps under the canopy

entered.detail: futuristic gas station structure with illuminated windows and signage
tall neon sign displaying fuel prices in bright yellow
large red rock outcropping adjacent to the gas station

segments.scene_description: Approaching a lit gas station at a desert intersection, the vehicle slows and executes a turn. Pedestrians stand near the pumps under the glowing canopy, with neon signs and rock formations visible before the vehicle turns back onto the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway return transitioning to off-road dirt

events.description: turns sharply off the paved highway onto desert dirt terrain
vehicle leaves asphalt completely and drives onto sandy desert ground

agents.ego_description: accelerating on the highway then veering off onto desert dirt terrain, kicking up dust

entered.detail: break in the guardrail leading to dirt desert terrain
scattered desert vegetation and small rocks on the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: Returning to the open desert highway, the vehicle accelerates past familiar billboards before making a sharp turn off the paved road onto dirt terrain. The scene transitions from asphalt to sandy desert ground with scattered bushes and rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a misty urban highway into a desolate, neon-lit desert landscape. It begins on a multi-lane highway at night, where wet asphalt reflects streetlights beneath a heavy shroud of fog and overhead structures. As the vehicle moves forward, the open road narrows into a concrete underpass characterized by massive support pillars and dimmer lighting before emerging once again into the misty night. The scene then shifts as the urban infrastructure fades, opening up into a sparse desert terrain with low vegetation. Finally, the camera passes under towering illuminated billboards while the headlights of an oncoming vehicle cut through the lingering fog in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit desert outpost back onto the open highway and finally onto rugged wilderness. It begins as the vehicle slows to navigate a turn toward a glowing gas station, passing pedestrians under a bright canopy amidst towering rock formations and flickering neon signs. As the vehicle turns back onto the asphalt, the scene opens up into the expansive desert highway where the camera accelerates past towering billboards. The movement then shifts abruptly as the vehicle makes a sharp turn off the paved road, transitioning the terrain from smooth asphalt to sandy desert ground. The shot concludes by moving deeper into the wilderness, surrounded by scattered bushes and jagged rocks under the night sky.
